<!--
Template created by KittyTeggie under the Creative Commons Zero v1.0 (public domain) license.
https://github.com/kittyteggie/mediawiki-templates

REMEMBER TO CHANGE THE TITLE OF THE TEMPLATE TO 'MessageBox/doc' FOR IT TO WORK /!\
-->
'''NOTE:''' This template was created by kittyteggie [https://github.com/kittyteggie/mediawiki-templates on GitHub]. Any issue fill it [https://github.com/kittyteggie/mediawiki-templates/issues here].

== Parameters ==
{| class="wikitable" style="width: 100%"
! Parameter name
! Description
! Required?
! Default
|-
| <code>border-color</code>
| The color of the borders in the template.
| No
| 10px solid black
|-
| <code>background-color</code>
| The color of the box's background.
| No
| Stylesheet default
|-
| <code>image</code>
| An image added as an icon on the left of the box.
| No
| N/A
|-
| <code>imagewidth</code>
| The width of the image.
| No
| N/A (Width automatically adjusts)
|-
| <code>imagelink</code>
| The link to which the image points to, if there is not the image will be unclickable
| No
| N/A
|-
| <code>text</code>
| Non-bold text placed below the header, can be used to explain the subject of the message box
| No
| N/A
|}
